name: Lemon Pudding Pound Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Instant lemon pudding mix (3 5/8- or 3 3/4-ounce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs until thick and lemon-colored.
2. Add dry cake mix, pudding mix, water, and oil; beat for 10 minutes at medium speed of an electric mixer, scraping the bowl occasionally.
3. Pour batter into an ungreased 10-inch tube pan with a removable bottom.
4. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F until done, about 50 minutes.
5. Meanwhile, combine powdered sugar and lemon juice; heat to boiling.
6. Leaving the cake on the pan's bottom, remove the sides of the pan from the hot cake.
7. Using a fork, prick holes all over the top of the cake.
8. Brush the hot lemon mixture over the entire cake.
9. Cool. Remove the pan's bottom.
